observation_window: from provider capability composition through terminal public result and cleanup
domain_side_effect_scope: all non-input Tool calls, task artifacts, flow effects, protected actions, and sibling agent work caused by the failing branch

conditions.description: Initial standard input is piped or closed.
The controlling terminal disappears while waiting.
A submitted answer has the wrong semantic type.
A submitted selection contains an unknown choice value.
An accepted response omits a required answer.
An authorized semantically identical resolution is repeated.
A conflicting second resolution follows the winner.
The continuation has expired before resolution.
The containing run is cancelled with pending input.
A durable synchronous caller's input handoff wait budget is exhausted while the required interaction remains pending.
An advisory wait budget is exhausted.
A renderer cannot honor an advisory UI hint.
A protocol peer lacks the negotiated capability.
